items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between 2 miles NORTH of Exit 13: TO I-76 / PA-291 WEST VALLEY FORGE and Exit 17: PA 611 NORTH BROAD ST/PATTISON AVE. There is a lane restriction.
